response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including low-latency systems and microservices, with demonstrated leadership in scaling teams. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of agentic AI systems in production, fintech domain expertise, or regulatory-compliance experience. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not yet proven at scale. The fintech-critical skills (real-time credit risk, trade decisioning, multi-jurisdiction compliance) are not highlighted.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and low-latency backend expertise (e.g., Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and introducing best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
Cross-stack versatility with event-driven systems and Kubernetes deployment (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit production experience with agentic AI systems or multi-agent frameworks
Limited fintech domain exposure; no mention of credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance
Regulatory-compliance experience for fintech is not demonstrated
